page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.large is a general-purpose instance powered by an Intel x86_64 processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per physical core.

This instance includes 118 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage. It runs on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which offloads virtualization functions to dedicated hardware. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps, and the instance is optimized for both network and Elastic Block Store (EBS) performance. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8idn.large offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources, moderate memory, and fast local NVMe storage. The primary tradeoff is the limited scale of 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, which restricts its use to lighter workloads. This instance is configured for general-purpose applications, small databases, local caching layers, and development environments that benefit from dedicated CPU execution and high-speed local storage.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.large is a general-purpose instance featuring an Intel x86_64 processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs from 1 physical core running at 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance includes 118 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which optimizes virtualization overhead. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and is optimized for both network and EBS throughput. Lacking GPU acceleration and featuring a compact resource profile, this instance is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources alongside fast local storage. It is suitable for small databases, general-purpose application hosting, development environments, and lightweight caching systems.

tagline: A general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, balanced memory allocation, and integrated high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.

8.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
118 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD instance storage
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS and network optimization

Suited for small databases, lightweight caching, and general-purpose applications
